---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] short summary"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Problem**
Describe the problem this feature solves.

**Solution**
Describe a concise solution or behavior you expect.

**Implementation notes (optional)**
Suggested approach, code areas affected, or references.

**Complexity estimate**
- [ ] small (1–3 days)
- [ ] medium (3–7 days)
- [ ] large (7+ days)

**I'm willing to work on this**
- [ ] I will work on this
